label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 5

extraction.one_line_summary: GROVES Kaden won a sprint by one-third of a wheel over GANNA Filippo after intermediate sprint bonus hunting by GC contenders.
tactical_patterns: EVENEPOEL Remco prioritized intermediate sprint bonuses pre-summit finish, taking 6 seconds despite knowing Stage 6 summit finish loomed.
GANNA Filippo deployed early center-road positioning from 650m, nearly stealing sprint despite being ineos rouleur not pure sprinter.
SEPULVEDA maintained KOM jersey by attacking breakaway companion FAGUNDES on categorized climb rather than cooperating through finish.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: Confident enough in Stage 6 form to burn matches for intermediate bonuses day before summit finish
rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: positive: Skipped intermediate sprint watts expenditure while competitors fought, superior tactical conservation
rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: neutral: Nearly won sprint from rouleur role suggesting Ineos may deploy him differently in future sprints
rider_signals.MENTON Marlon: negative: Crashed on roundabout approach negating Lotto-Dstny sprint setup before finale
